flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Massachusetts-Amherst fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Massachusetts-Amherst are 25% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($71.6k vs $57.4k).
